name: boundary-segmenter
description: W2 — Jaccard-Cosine Boundary Segmentation. Sylph's defining engine. Clusters PostToolUse(Edit|Write) events into task boundaries via multi-modal distance (file-set Jaccard + token cosine + idle-time gap). Standalone: works without Crow V1 by deriving token vectors from edit content. Upgraded automatically when Crow V1 embeddings are available on the event bus.
